title: DialogOpenPathMethod
description: Contract for dialog.openPath. ELECTRON-HANDLED ONLY — opens a folder in the native file manager (Finder on macOS). Never forwarded to the Go core.

path.description: Absolute path of the folder to reveal in Finder

DialogOpenPathResponse.title: DialogOpenPathResponse
DialogOpenPathResponse.description: Result of dialog.openPath. Errors: operation_error (1006) if Electron returns a non-empty error string.
